message:
fix(mcp): consolidate error mapping, harden tools, and improve prompt quality

mod.rs:
- Extract shared to_mcp() error helper into module root, eliminating
  duplicate definitions in prompts.rs and resources.rs

tools.rs:
- Add UPDATE_FIELD_KEYS constant for distinguishing field updates from
  label/comment side-effects
- Make nullable_str() return McpResult to reject non-string/non-null
  values instead of silently treating objects as None
- Fix CycleDetected suggestion: suggest list_issues instead of
  manage_dependencies (which requires an id we don't have)
- Improve error message comments for suggested tool calls

prompts.rs:
- Use Status and IssueType imports directly instead of fully-qualified
  paths (crate::model::Status, crate::model::IssueType)
- Include deferred issues in dependency health context (they're still
  part of the project graph)
- Remove redundant closed-status filter in orphan detection (open_issues
  already excludes closed)
- Clean up display limit constants documentation

resources.rs:
- Remove unused in_degree HashMap from graph health computation
- Use shared to_mcp from module root

Cargo.lock:
- Update fastmcp-rust and fsqlite workspace dependency source URLs
  from local paths to git+https pinned refs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
